utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items. Each item appears to be fully specified: (1) health_coverage includes both physical and mental insurance with costs and details, (2) property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with cost and details, (3) travel_coverage includes travel insurance with cost and details, (4) additional_services is specified as N/A but still addressed, (5) total_budget includes both monthly and annual cost breakdowns. Therefore, all required items are present and fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main selections: physical health coverage (€45, basic tier, 15% deductible, 24/7 emergency support), mental health coverage (€30, basic tier, 15% deductible, specialist access within a week), property coverage (€90, premium tier, €4,500 equipment limit), and travel insurance (€50, standard tier, 10% deductible, global coverage). Comparing these to the ground-truth options: The physical health plan matches SecureLife Basic Plan (same €45, 15% deductible, basic tier) with rating 4. The mental health plan matches CareCo Basic Plan (same €30, basic, high satisfaction) with rating 10. The property coverage aligns with PrimeHome Premium Coverage (€90, premium, high limit for photography equipment) with rating 3. The travel coverage aligns with InsurePlus Standard Plan (€50, standard, global, adventure coverage) with rating 10.
